name: Date and Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dates and 1 1/2 teaspoons of baking soda in a small pan.
2. Pour boiling water over the dates; stir to blend. Let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Cream margarine and sugar together until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
6. Alternately add dry ingredients and the date mixture to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Mix until just combined; the batter will be thin.
7. Pour the batter into an oiled and floured 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
8. Sprinkle chocolate chips and chopped walnuts evenly over the top of the batter.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Cool completely before cutting into 28 pieces (4 across and 7 down).
